text:
There once was owl. Owl lived alone. Owl enjoyed solitude. Owl ate worms. Owl dreamed alone.

Then owl heard something odd.

Just offshore lay eggs. Owl could hear little voices.

Come out? Owl thought. Owl flew fast.

They came closer. Owls flew away. Owl went hungry.

One day owl saw bird flutter.

That dove could talk.

Show owl secrets?

That owl could fly big feathers. Birds wouldn't listen.

They scoff owl.

Just hunt alone.

A bird stole owl's feast.

That's owl's diet.

So owl ate alone.

Then owl grew old.

Just quiet thoughts.

That owl was wise.




Just one friend.



Just listen Owl.







Just listen Owl.





Just think owl.





Just find bird.





That's good.





Just think owl.




Just sleep owl.




That's owl.





Just think owl.





Just remember.



That owl loves birds.





Just think owl.




That owl dreams bigger than flight.




That owl loves bird.

That owl just loves.




Just listen
